mapper.select: select coupon_template_id as couponTemplateId, valid_days as validDays, valid_start as validStart, valid_end as validEnd from jst_coupon_template where coupon_template_id = #{couponTemplateId} and status = 1 and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select count(1) from jst_user_coupon where order_id = #{exchangeId} and status = 'used' and del_flag = '0'
